intro.speaker: Firedancer
intro.text: So you're the storm that scattered my swarm. Every dance ends, Aviator.

intro.speaker: Aviator
intro.text: Then let's make the last one worth watching.

intro.speaker: Firedancer
intro.text: Burn brightly, little bird. The gauntlet is open!

outro.speaker: Firedancer
outro.text: Beautiful... like falling embers. The sky is yours, for now.

outro.speaker: Aviator
outro.text: For now is enough. Time to fly home.
